use_cases: Displaying error messages and validation feedback in forms and applications
Showing success confirmations after user-submitted actions like purchases or registrations
Presenting informational alerts and system notifications to users
Rendering warning messages for important notices or potential issues
Creating contextual status messages with semantic meaning through color-coded variants
ai_summary: A semantic alert/notification component with five color-coded variants (default, error, info, success, warning) using CVA for variant management. Features a grid-based layout with icon support, accessible role='alert', and dark mode compatibility. The component exports four sub-components for composing title, description, and action elements within alert messages. Designed for displaying contextual feedback, status updates, and system notifications across SaaS, e-commerce, and general web applications.
